contentBlocks.original:
पद्मपत्र विशालाक्षि पद्यकेसरवर्णिनी।
नित्यं पद्मालया देवी सा मां पातु सरस्वती ।।
contentBlocks.transliteration:
padmapatra viśālākṣi padyakesaravarṇinī.
nityaṃ padmālayā devī sā māṃ pātu sarasvatī ..
contentBlocks.translation: Wide-eyed as the lotus leaf, with the light saffron colour of lotus as companion, the goddess eternally resident on the lotus - may that Saraswathi protect me.
contentBlocks.meanings: पद्मपत्र (padmapatra) – lotus leaf (padma:lotus | patra:leaf); विशालाक्षि (viśālākṣi) – wide-eyed (viśāla:wide | akṣi:eye); पद्यकेसरवर्णिनी (padyakesaravarṇinī) – with lotus saffron color (padya:lotus | kesara:saffron | varṇinī:colored); नित्यं (nityaṃ) – eternally; पद्मालया (padmālayā) – resident on the lotus (padma:lotus | ālaya:residence); देवी (devī) – goddess; सा (sā) – she; मां (māṃ) – me; पातु (pātu) – protect; सरस्वती (sarasvatī) – Saraswati;
